stories.title: NFL execs pick their 8 favorite offseason moves: W...
stories.summary: We talked to sources around the league about their favorite moves of the offseason. The answers ranged from megadeals to a surprise draft pick.

stories.title: Raiders players' first impressions of QB Fernando ...
stories.summary: We asked players and coaches about their impressions of the Raiders' rookie and No. 1 pick during OTAs.

stories.title: Family to have Smith's brain checked for CTE
stories.summary: The family of Aldon Smith has decided to send his brain to medical experts in Boston to see whether CTE played a role in the former NFL defensive lineman's death.

stories.title: Chiefs' Rice released from jail, dodges reporters
stories.summary: Chiefs WR Rashee Rice was released from a Dallas County jail on Tuesday after serving a 30-day sentence for violating the terms of his probation.

stories.title: Tortorella not returning as Golden Knights' coach
stories.summary: John Tortorella, who was hired with eight games left in the regular season and guided the Golden Knights to the Stanley Cup Final, will not return as coach next season.
